content.en:
"You actually ruined the !! of the Extreme Mango White Grass"

Many of the Extreme Creatures were furious.

This is the Extreme Mangscan White Grass, a treasure that even the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm desires, and its value is so high, it is even higher than the value of the Golden Extreme Dao Monument.

It's not useful to them, but it's worth trading with the Perfect Masters of the Extreme Realm!

But now, it was ruined by Ye Tian like this.

If it was outside Jimang Mountain, they would definitely besiege and kill Ye Tian.

But this is Jimang Mountain, and they don't dare to do it.

"Humph!"

Ye Tian snorted coldly and left directly.

As time slowly passed, Ye Tian found a large number of treasures, and the day of the closure of Jimang Mountain was coming.

"It's time to get out!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Soon, the power of the Extreme Mang will spread throughout the entire Extreme Mang Mountain, although he can compete with a small amount of the power of the Extreme Mang, but once the Extreme Mang Mountain is full of the power of the Extreme Mang, he will not be able to bear it, and he will definitely fall.

Of course.

He also knew very well that if he went out like this, there would inevitably be a large number of Extreme Dao creatures outside the Extreme Mang Mountain to besiege him.

"Then we can only kill them in one big game, and kill them with fear!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

Outside the Pole Mang Mountain.

The dense Extreme Dao creatures gathered here, just waiting for Ye Tian to come out.

"If the Lord of Endless comes out, he will surely die!"

The Lord of the Fox Sun said coldly.

With so many extreme creatures, it was almost impossible for Ye Tian to escape.

If it weren't for Ye Tian destroying the Extreme Mangbai Grass and snatching away the Golden Extreme Dao Monument, plus the fact that he had collected all the net worth of many Extreme Dao creatures on his body, there would have been too many Extreme Dao creatures who wanted to kill Ye Tian.

Now, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace has offered an unimaginable reward, so it can gather so many Extreme Path creatures.

However.

What these Extreme Dao creatures didn't know was that Ye Tian's other replica body had already left with most of the resources, and it was not here in Extreme Mang Mountain at all.

Therefore, Ye Tian didn't worry about anything at all.

Of course, he didn't want this replica body of Jimang Mountain to fall, after all, there were a lot of resources on this replica body, and there was also a Golden Pole Dao Monument.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian walked out of Jimang Mountain, and instantly sensed the dense Extreme Dao creatures around him.

"More than 50,000 Extreme Dao creatures, you really look up to me!"

Ye Tian said helplessly.

In fact, there are far more extreme path creatures that have entered the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, but it is already very good to be able to gather more than 50,000 extreme path creatures.

After all, not all Extreme Creatures are willing to besiege and kill a demon like Ye Tian!

All the Extreme Dao creatures knew very well that besieging and killing Ye Tian would inevitably have to pay a heavy price, depending on who was unlucky!

"Kill!"

An Exalted Divine creature has struck.

And Ye Tian didn't go all out, if he did it with all his strength, showing thousands of extreme paths would definitely make all the extreme path creatures frightened, and his secret would be exposed.

"Then expose a hundred extreme paths!"

Ye Tian decided.

Rumble!!!

The power of a hundred extreme paths emerged in Ye Tian's body, including the time pole at the peak of the Dacheng level, the space pole at the Dacheng level, the sword pole at the Dacheng level, and the defense pole at the Dacheng level, and the other extreme paths were all introductory.

In addition, the Endless Extreme Dao, which is at the pinnacle of entry, dominates these Extreme Paths and bursts out with unimaginable power.

Under the explosion of the power of the Extreme Dao, those Extreme Dao Control Techniques made these Extreme Dao creatures stunned.

"He actually comprehended a hundred kinds of extreme paths, and there were several great level extreme paths!!

The Lord of the Fox Sun was dumbfounded.

This is Ye Tian, the Lord of Endless, it's too demonic!

Moreover, Ye Tian's physical body was too terrifying, many times more terrifying than these extreme creatures like them!

Thundered!!!!

The Great War has begun!

Although the attacks of the Extreme Dao creatures can hurt Ye Tian, Ye Tian's recovery ability is too terrifying, and Ye Tian's attacks are also extremely terrifying, no one of the Extreme Dao creatures can stop it, and he will die if he touches it.

In the blink of an eye, a supreme creature was bombarded and killed, turning into bones and falling to the earth.

However, Ye Tian is like an unbeatable Xiaoqiang, no matter how these extreme creatures burst out of their hole cards, they can't kill Ye Tian.

Abrupt.

A silver light tore through time and space, shattering all the rules, and hit Ye Tian's body.

"Extreme Treasure !!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

This turned out to be a real Extreme Treasure, but not those mutilated Treasures!

I didn't expect that there would be an Extreme Path creature bringing in with an Extreme Dao Treasure!

But if you think about it carefully, almost all extreme creatures only have one life, if there is an extreme treasure, naturally take it, or if you die, the extreme treasure will become an ownerless thing, and it will inevitably become a treasure of other extreme creatures in the future.

Therefore, this Extreme Path creature naturally carries the Extreme Path Treasure.

This time, if it weren't for the other party's life-and-death crisis, it wouldn't have stimulated the Extreme Treasure.

I have to say that the power of the Extreme Dao Treasure is very terrifying, and it locks on Ye Tian, so it is impossible to dodge it at all.

"You can only resist hard!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Burst!!!!

This Extreme Dao Treasure broke Ye Tian's layers of protection, and even the Endless Extreme Dao Perfect Ancestor Body was pierced.

However, Ye Tian did not die, but was seriously injured.

"Give me death!"

Ye Tian killed the Extreme Dao creature with one blow in the air, and this Extreme Dao Treasure immediately became an ownerless thing and was taken away by Ye Tian.

"The Endless Lord is injured, kill!"

One Extreme Dao creature felt that there was hope of killing Ye Tian.

However, Ye Tian had too many perfect-grade ancestral endowments to recover from his injuries, and as the battle continued, his injuries became lighter and lighter.

As time passed, more than 10,000 Extreme Path creatures had fallen, and other Extreme Path creatures were also injured.

At this moment, the Lord of the Fox Sun saw that the situation was not good and fled directly.

He was really scared, Ye Tian was simply much more terrifying than those top Limble Realm Perfect Controllers, and he couldn't be killed at all, and his power was almost endless, he was simply a creature that broke the rules of the Extreme Dao!

In other words, the other top Limbo Perfect Controllers have long been exhausted.

Seeing that the situation was not good, the Extreme Path creatures were not only the Lord of the Fox Sun, but also other Extreme Path creatures, and they also ran away one by one.

This run directly made the other Extreme Path creatures lose the heart to fight, and they all ran away one by one.

In the blink of an eye, there was no longer a single Extreme Path creature around, only the corpses of nearly 20,000 Extreme Path Creatures remained.

"It's good that you sent me a lot of resources again!"

Ye Tian smiled.

However, in this battle, he really consumed most of his strength, even if he has been refining resources to recover his strength, but he can't keep up with the consumption, if there are more extreme creatures, and they are all desperate, he will really be consumed to death.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian collected the corpses of these extreme creatures, they all had a lot of resources, so many resources were enough to compare to their entire net worth, and even a lot more.

After taking away the corpses of these extreme creatures, Ye Tian immediately fled.
